items.title: DOMPurify & escape-goat — XSS Defense Libraries
items.description: One-liner: Client-side JavaScript libraries for safely inserting user-supplied content into the DOM — preventing XSS at the output stage.

items.title: Injection & XSS
items.description: Injection attacks insert malicious code into a trusted context; XSS is the browser-side variant where attacker-controlled scripts execute in a victim's browser.
